name: aiexpert-essential
description: Seventeen universal skills that turn Claude into an operating partner regardless of role or industry. The free foundation every Claude user installs before choosing a Persona Layer. Ships Anthropic's default agentic posture: human-approval-gate, install-anthropic-defaults, context-rot-check, claude-account-audit. Plus session handoffs, snippet hoarding, dream escalation, daily and weekly reviews, decision logging, context management, project scaffolding, voice-corpus building, voice-input protocol, CLAUDE.md hygiene, LIVING-NOTES.md hygiene, and domain-glossary building. Model-agnostic. Portable across Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Claude.ai, Codex, and Cursor.

credits.name: Matt Pocock
credits.for: /handoff skill design and /grill-with-docs ubiquitous-language pattern (both MIT) adapted for glossary-builder

credits.name: Simon Willison
credits.for: 'Hoard things you know how to do' pattern (inspiration)

credits.name: Anthropic
credits.for: Public guidance on agentic default posture, codified into human-approval-gate, install-anthropic-defaults, and claude-account-audit.

credits.name: Brett K. Moore
credits.for: Author of the Essential Bundle and the Claude Mastery architecture.
